zone_detail.title: Zone details
zone_detail.interp_access_critical: Critical accessibility — {{pct}}% of farms >10 km from a market
zone_detail.interp_access_poor: Poor accessibility — {{pct}}% far from a market

top_zones.title: Top zones to invest in
top_zones.subtitle: Ranked by composite priority score
top_zones.select_hint: Click a zone to center the map

tooltip.synthesis_score: Overall score combining density, accessibility, cooperative network and ZAAP coverage. Higher scores indicate better agricultural service coverage.
tooltip.density_score: Number of farms relative to prefecture area, normalized to 100. A high score indicates dense agricultural activity.
tooltip.access_score: Average distance to agricultural services (markets, cooperatives, ZAAPs), normalized to 100. Higher scores mean better access.
tooltip.coop_score: Cooperative density and distribution, normalized to 100. A high score indicates a strong cooperative network.
tooltip.zaap_score: Territory coverage rate by Planned Agricultural Development Zones (ZAAP), normalized to 100.
tooltip.density_raw: Total number of farms divided by the prefecture's surface area.
tooltip.avg_distance: Weighted average distance from farms to the nearest agricultural service.
tooltip.white_zones: Percentage of surface area not covered by a ZAAP.
tooltip.zaap_coverage: Percentage of surface area covered by at least one ZAAP.
tooltip.priority_level: Based on synthesis score: critical (< 40), moderate (40-65), well-served (> 65).

legend.title: Understanding scores
legend.zaap: ZAAP = Planned Agricultural Development Zone. Dedicated agricultural perimeters developed by the state.
legend.thresholds: Thresholds: < 40 = critical (urgent investment needed), 40-65 = moderate (improvement possible), > 65 = well-served.
legend.calculation: Each score is calculated from field data (971 markets, 55 cooperatives, 737 farms) and normalized to a 0-100 scale.
